steps.title: Perpendicular lines: negative reciprocal slope
steps.content: Line k has slope $-\dfrac{3}{4}$ (read from the figure). For line j perpendicular to k, flip and negate: $$m_j = -\frac{1}{-3/4} = \frac{4}{3}$$

steps.title: Read off the answer
steps.content: The equation is $y = \dfrac{4}{3}x - 8$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
